title: Recommendation
content:
# Recommendation

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### get_recommendation_clustering(data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationClusteringGet, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> KList[responses.RecommendationClustering]

Retrieve the total count of Recommendations matching an array of `resources` and filter options between two dates grouped by the parameter `time_bucket`. Will also return a list of all the Recommendation `id`s counted.


### create_recommendation(data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.RecommendationCreate

Create a new Recommendation. The new recommendation will automatically inherit the state `pending`.


### get_recommendation_last(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationLastGet, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.Recommendation], responses.RecommendationLastGetPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a dictionary with a data property containing an array of latest Recommendations. Only the latest Recommendation for each `resource` in the request filters will be returned.


### list_recommendations(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationsList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.Recommendation], responses.RecommendationsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Recommendation objects. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### get_recommendation_range(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationRangeGet, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.Recommendation], responses.RecommendationRangeGetPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a dictionary with a data property containing an array of Recommendations within a specified time range for all of the `resources` in the `resources` array that match the filter options.


### create_recommendation_type(data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationTypeCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.RecommendationTypeCreate

Create a new Recommendation Type.


### list_recommendation_types(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], search: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.RecommendationType], responses.RecommendationTypesListPaginatedCursor]

Returns a list of Recommendation Type objects. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned. **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.recommendation.read`.


### delete_recommendation_type(name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Recommendation Type. An error will be returned if there are any current Recommendations linked to the Recommendation Type. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### get_recommendation_type(name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.RecommendationTypeGet

Retrieves the parameters of a Recommendation Type.


### update_recommendation_type(name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationTypeUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.RecommendationTypeUpdate

Updates an existing Recommendation Type with any new values passed through the body parameters. All body parameters are optional and if not provided will remain unchanged. Only the unique identifier `name` can not be changed.


### update_recommendation_accept(recommendation_id: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationAcceptUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Update a Recommendation `state` to `accepted`. This will trigger all objects in the `actions` parameter to be initiated. You will need to continue to monitor each action individually (for example a Control Change) to ensure it is completed successfully.


### delete_recommendation(recommendation_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Recommendation. Recommendations with `states` tagged as `accepted`, `auto_accepted` or `error` can not be deleted. This action cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted. **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.recommendation.delete`.


### get_recommendation(recommendation_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.RecommendationGet

Retrieves the properties, status and all associated actions of a Recommendation.


### update_recommendation_reject(recommendation_id: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.RecommendationRejectUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Update a Recommendation `state` to `rejected`. All `actions` will only be archived and not implemented.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.recommendation.get_recommendation_clustering()
